Description: Project Management — Permit lifecycle oversight and coordination
Notes: PM oversight across all 5 phases (19 steps); LOE source provides 6 hrs

Description: Cost Estimator — Permit cost impact assessment
Notes: Cost/schedule impact evaluation of permit conditions; LOE source provides 4 hrs

Description: Permitting Specialist — Pre-application engagement with Camrose County building authority
Notes: Contact authority; obtain forms/checklist; confirm requirements; clarify Safety Code relationship; coordinate fee arrangement

Description: Permitting Specialist — Application package assembly and internal review
Notes: Confirm IFC completeness across 6 disciplines; review dev permit conditions; assemble application; conduct pre-submission code compliance review

Description: Permitting Specialist — Application submission and authority review management
Notes: Submit to Camrose County; track status; respond to RFIs; manage rejection/revision if required

Description: Permitting Specialist — Permit receipt and conditions documentation
Notes: Receive permit; document all conditions; evaluate cost/schedule impact; enter into DEL-009-04; confirm construction gate

Description: Permitting Specialist — Inspection coordination during construction
Notes: Identify ~7 inspection stages; coordinate County representative attendance; submit requests; distribute reports; handle deficiencies; permit closeout

Description: Document Controller — Application package document compilation and records management
Notes: Compile IFC drawings from 6 disciplines; assemble application package; manage permit records; file inspection reports

Description: Senior Architect — Design coordination for permit application support
Notes: Review/coordinate IFC drawing set completeness across all architectural deliverables for permit submission

Description: Structural Engineer — Permit application structural review
Notes: Review structural IFC drawings for completeness and P.Eng. stamp verification

Description: Mechanical Engineer — Permit application mechanical review
Notes: Review mechanical/HVAC IFC drawings for completeness and P.Eng. stamp verification

Description: Electrical Engineer — Permit application electrical review
Notes: Review electrical IFC drawings for completeness and P.Eng. stamp verification

Description: Civil Engineer — Permit application civil/site review
Notes: Review civil/site grading IFC drawings for completeness and P.Eng. stamp verification

Description: Plumbing Engineer — Permit application plumbing review
Notes: Review plumbing IFC drawings for completeness and P.Eng. stamp verification
County pays fees (R-01 §3.3.1; SOW-0202). Proponent EXCLUDES this cost. Amount = 0 for Proponent estimate.
